payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Close, edge-cropped view of a reddish-brown wooden rectangular dining table top with visible plank seams and a mostly smooth satin finish; the tabletop fills the crop and is partially cut off by the image border (approx. 1.2 m from camera).
